text: ZX Bank is a leading global financial institution committed to providing innovative and secure banking solutions. Founded in 1995, we have grown to serve over 10 million customers worldwide.
title: ZX Bank Overview

text: To empower individuals and businesses by providing accessible, transparent, and efficient financial services that drive growth and prosperity.
title: ZX Bank Overview

text:
- **Integrity**: We uphold the highest ethical standards.
- **Innovation**: We constantly evolve to meet modern banking needs.
- **Customer Centricity**: Your financial well-being is our priority.
- **Security**: Protecting your assets and data is at the heart of everything we do.
title: ZX Bank Overview

text: We provide a wide range of services including personal savings, business loans, mortgage solutions, and advanced digital banking tools.
title: ZX Bank Overview

text: The ZX Bank Mobile App is your all-in-one financial companion, designed for speed, security, and ease of use. Available on both iOS and Android platforms.
title: Digital Banking App Features

text:
### Real-time Account Monitoring
View your balances, transaction history, and pending charges instantly from the dashboard.

### Instant Fund Transfers
Transfer money between your ZX Bank accounts or to other banks locally and internationally with just a few taps.

### Bill Payments
Schedule and pay utility bills, credit card statements, and other service providers directly from the app.
title: Digital Banking App Features

text:
### Biometric Authentication
Use FaceID or Fingerprint scanning for secure and fast login.

### Card Controls
Lock or unlock your debit and credit cards instantly if they are misplaced.

### Push Notifications
Receive real-time alerts for every transaction, ensuring you are always informed of your account activity.
title: Digital Banking App Features

text: Depositing a check is now easier than ever with the ZX Bank Mobile App. No need to visit a branch or ATM.
title: Mobile Check Deposit

text:
1. **Endorse the Check**: Sign the back of your check and write "For Mobile Deposit at ZX Bank Only" below your signature.
2. **Open the App**: Log in to your ZX Bank Mobile App.
3. **Select Deposit**: Tap on the 'Deposit' icon at the bottom of the screen.
4. **Enter Amount**: Type in the exact amount shown on the check.
5. **Take Photos**: Capture clear images of both the front and back of the endorsed check against a dark, flat surface.
6. **Confirm**: Review the details and submit the deposit.
title: Mobile Check Deposit

text:
- **Limits**: Daily and monthly limits apply based on your account type. Individual checks cannot exceed $5,000.
- **Wait Time**: Standard hold periods apply. Funds are typically available within 1-2 business days.
- **Keep the Check**: Retain the physical check for 10 days after the deposit is confirmed before securely destroying it.
title: Mobile Check Deposit

text: Your ZX Bank Debit Card is the key to accessing your funds worldwide. We offer comprehensive tools to manage your card via the mobile app and online banking.
title: Debit Card Management

text:
New cards must be activated before use. You can activate your card by:
- Logging into the ZX Bank Mobile App and selecting 'Activate Card'.
- Calling our automated activation line at 1-800-ZX-CARD.
- Using any ZX Bank ATM and entering your initial PIN sent via mail.
title: Debit Card Management

text:
### Lock and Unlock
If you misplace your card, use the 'Lock Card' feature in the app to prevent unauthorized transactions. You can unlock it instantly once found.

### Travel Notices
Planning a trip? Set a travel notice in the app to ensure your card works seamlessly in foreign countries and to prevent false fraud flags.
title: Debit Card Management

text: You can set daily spending limits and withdrawal limits directly from the app to help manage your budget and enhance security.
title: Debit Card Management

text: The ZX Credit Card Rewards Program is designed to give back to our loyal customers. Every purchase brings you closer to exciting rewards.
title: Credit Card Rewards Program

text:
- **Groceries & Dining**: Earn 3x points for every $1 spent.
- **Travel & Gas**: Earn 2x points for every $1 spent.
- **Other Purchases**: Earn 1x point for every $1 spent.
title: Credit Card Rewards Program

text:
### Cash Back
Every 1,000 points can be redeemed for $10 statement credit or direct deposit into your ZX savings account.

### Travel
Use your points to book flights, hotels, and car rentals through our ZX Travel Portal. Points have 25% more value when redeemed for travel.

### Gift Cards
Redeem points for gift cards from hundreds of popular retailers and restaurants.
title: Credit Card Rewards Program

text: Points do not expire as long as your account remains open and in good standing. There is no cap on the number of points you can earn.
title: Credit Card Rewards Program

text: ZX Bank has a vast network of over 50,000 fee-free ATMs across the country through our partnership with the AllPoint network.
title: ATM Locations & Fees

text: Withdrawals, deposits, and balance inquiries at any ZX Bank branded ATM are always free of charge.
title: ATM Locations & Fees

text:
### Out-of-Network Fees
- **Domestic**: A fee of $2.50 applies for each withdrawal at a non-ZX Bank or non-partner ATM.
- **International**: A fee of $5.00 applies for international withdrawals, plus a 3% foreign transaction fee.

### Withdrawal Limits
The standard daily ATM withdrawal limit is $1,000. This can be temporarily increased upon request through our customer support or via the app.
title: ATM Locations & Fees

text:
- Always cover your PIN when entering it.
- Be aware of your surroundings, especially at night.
- If you notice any suspicious devices on an ATM, do not use it and report it immediately.
title: ATM Locations & Fees

text: Our branches are designed to provide you with personalized financial advice and specialized services.
title: Branch Locations & Hours

text:
Standard operating hours for most ZX Bank branches are:
- **Monday - Friday**: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- **Saturday**: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- **Sunday**: Closed

*Note: Hours may vary by location. Please use the 'Find a Branch' tool on our website for specific details.*
title: Branch Locations & Hours

text:
- **Personal Banking Consulting**: Meet with an advisor for account planning.
- **Loan Applications**: Apply for personal, auto, or mortgage loans in person.
- **Safe Deposit Boxes**: Securely store your valuables (available at select locations).
- **Notary Services**: complimentary notary services for ZX Bank customers.
title: Branch Locations & Hours

text: To avoid wait times, we recommend scheduling an appointment through our mobile app or website before your visit.
title: Branch Locations & Hours

text: Wire transfers are a fast and secure way to send large sums of money. ZX Bank supports both domestic and international wire transfers.
title: Wire Transfer Procedures

text:
To send a domestic wire, you will need:
- Recipient's Full Name and Address
- Recipient's Bank Name and Address
- Recipient's Routing Number (9 digits)
- Recipient's Account Number

**Fees**: $25 per outgoing domestic wire.
title: Wire Transfer Procedures

text:
- **Same-Day Processing**: Wires submitted before 4:00 PM EST on business days are processed the same day.
- **Arrival Time**: Funds typically arrive within 24 hours for domestic transfers.
title: Wire Transfer Procedures

text: For your protection, wire transfers above $10,000 may require a verbal callback verification from our security team. Ensure your phone number on file is up to date.
title: Wire Transfer Procedures

text: ZX Bank provides reliable international wire transfer services to over 200 countries. We utilize the SWIFT network to ensuring your funds reach their destination safely.
title: International Transfers

text:
To send an international transfer, you will need the following details from the recipient:
- Recipient's Full Legal Name
- Recipient's Full Physical Address
- Recipient's Bank Name and Branch Address
- **SWIFT/BIC Code**: The unique identifier for the recipient's bank.
- **IBAN/Account Number**: The recipient's bank account number, often in IBAN format for Europe and the Middle East.
title: International Transfers

text:
- **Outgoing Fee**: $45 per international wire.
- **Exchange Rates**: Real-time exchange rates apply at the time of the transaction. A small conversion margin may be included.
title: International Transfers

text: International wires typically take between 2 to 5 business days to reach the recipient, depending on the destination country and any intermediary banks involved.
title: International Transfers

text: Once initiated, you will receive a reference number that can be used to track the status of your transfer through our international support desk.
title: International Transfers

section: Start Your Journey with ZX Bank
text: Opening an account with ZX Bank is a straightforward process that can be completed online or in person at any of our branches.
title: Account Opening Requirements

text:
- Must be at least 18 years old (Minors can open custodial accounts).
- Must have a valid Social Security Number (SSN) or Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN).
- Must be a legal resident of a country where ZX Bank operates.
title: Account Opening Requirements

text:
- **Primary Identification**: A valid government-issued photo ID (e.g., Driver's License, Passport, State ID).
- **Secondary Identification**: One additional form of ID (e.g., Social Security card, birth certificate, credit card from another bank).
- **Proof of Address**: A utility bill, lease agreement, or bank statement dated within the last 60 days.
title: Account Opening Requirements

text:
A minimum initial deposit is required to open most accounts.
- **Basic Checking**: $25
- **Standard Savings**: $50
- **Premium Accounts**: $1,000
title: Account Opening Requirements

text: If applying online, you will need to scan and upload copies of the required documents and complete an electronic signature process.
title: Account Opening Requirements

text: Know Your Customer (KYC) is a mandatory process for all financial institutions to verify the identity of their clients. This helps us prevent fraud, money laundering, and other illegal activities.
title: KYC & Identity Verification

text:
When you open an account or request specific services, we perform a series of checks to confirm your identity.

### Identity Checks
We verify your government-issued ID against official records. In some cases, we may use facial recognition technology to match your selfie with your ID photo.

### Address Verification
We confirm your residential address through third-party databases or by reviewing your provided proof of address documents.

### Background Screening
We check public records and sanction lists to ensure compliance with international financial regulations.
title: KYC & Identity Verification

text: KYC protects both the bank and our customers. By ensuring we know who our customers are, we can provide a safer banking environment for everyone.
title: KYC & Identity Verification

text: You are required to notify ZX Bank of any significant changes to your personal information, such as a change of address or legal name, to keep your records up to date and compliant.
title: KYC & Identity Verification

section: Applying for a Personal or Auto Loan
text: ZX Bank offers competitive rates and flexible terms for all your lending needs. Our application process is designed to be quick and efficient.
title: Loan Application Process

text:
1. **Pre-qualification**: Check your potential rates without affecting your credit score on our website.
2. **Submit Application**: Complete the full application form online or in a branch.
3. **Documentation**: Provide proof of income (pay stubs, tax returns) and employment verification.
4. **Review**: Our underwriters will review your credit history, income, and debt-to-income ratio.
5. **Approval and Funding**: If approved, sign the loan agreement electronically. Funds are often deposited into your ZX account within 24 hours.
title: Loan Application Process

text:
- Minimum credit score of 620.
- Stable employment history for at least 2 years.
- Debt-to-income ratio below 40%.
title: Loan Application Process

text: We offer various repayment methods, including automatic monthly payments which may qualify you for an interest rate discount of 0.25%.
title: Loan Application Process

text: ZX Bank offers a variety of mortgage products to help you achieve the dream of homeownership.
title: Mortgage Products

text:
### Fixed-Rate Mortgages
Your interest rate and monthly principal and interest payments remain the same for the life of the loan. Available in 15, 20, and 30-year terms.

### Adjustable-Rate Mortgages (ARM)
Typically start with a lower interest rate for an initial period (e.g., 5, 7, or 10 years), after which the rate adjusts periodically based on market conditions.

### First-Time Homebuyer Programs
Special programs with lower down payment requirements (as low as 3%) and flexible credit guidelines for those buying their first home.
title: Mortgage Products

text:
1. **Pre-approval**: Get a clear idea of how much you can borrow.
2. **House Hunting**: Find your dream home with confidence.
3. **Formal Application**: Provide detailed financial information and property details.
4. **Appraisal and Inspection**: Ensure the property value and condition are acceptable.
5. **Closing**: Sign the final documents and get the keys to your new home.
title: Mortgage Products

text: Our mortgage specialists are available to guide you through every step of the process and help you choose the best product for your financial situation.
title: Mortgage Products

text: At ZX Bank, we offer competitive interest rates to help your money work harder for you. Our rates are reviewed monthly to ensure they remain industry-leading.
title: Savings Account Interest Rates

text:
### Basic Savings
- **Annual Percentage Yield (APY)**: 0.50%
- **Minimum Balance to Earn APY**: $1
- **Monthly Fee**: None if balance stays above $100

### High-Yield Savings
- **APY**: 4.25%
- **Minimum Balance to Earn APY**: $1,000
- **Monthly Fee**: None if balance stays above $2,500

### Premium Money Market
- **APY**: up to 4.50% (Tiered based on balance)
- **Minimum Balance to Earn APY**: $25,000
- **Monthly Fee**: None if balance stays above $10,000
title: Savings Account Interest Rates

text: Interest is compounded daily and credited to your account on the last business day of each month.
title: Savings Account Interest Rates

text: Interest rates are subject to change based on market conditions and Federal Reserve adjustments. Any significant changes will be communicated via your monthly statement.
title: Savings Account Interest Rates

section: Secure Your Future with Fixed Deposits
text: Fixed Deposits (FD), also known as Certificates of Deposit (CD), offer a guaranteed rate of return for a set period.
title: Fixed Deposit Terms

text:
We offer FD terms ranging from 6 months to 5 years:
- **6 Months**: 4.75% APY
- **12 Months**: 5.10% APY
- **24 Months**: 4.85% APY
- **36 Months**: 4.60% APY
- **60 Months**: 4.50% APY
title: Fixed Deposit Terms

text:
### Minimum Deposit
The minimum opening deposit for a ZX Fixed Deposit is $1,000.

### Early Withdrawal Penalty
Withdrawing funds before the maturity date will result in a penalty:
- **Terms < 1 year**: 90 days of simple interest.
- **Terms >= 1 year**: 180 days of simple interest.

### Maturity Options
Upon maturity, you can:
1. Reinvest the principal and interest for the same term at current rates.
2. Withdraw the full amount (principal plus interest).
3. Transfer the funds to your ZX savings or checking account.

*If no action is taken within 10 days of maturity, the FD will automatically renew for the same term.*
title: Fixed Deposit Terms

text: ZX Bank uses advanced AI-driven monitoring systems to detect suspicious activity 24/7. Your security is our top priority.
title: Fraud Detection & Reporting

text:
- **Unusual Spending Patterns**: Sudden large purchases or transactions in unusual locations.
- **Multiple Failed Logins**: Repeated unsuccessful attempts to access your account.
- **Phishing Detection**: Identifying and blocking malicious links and fraudulent communication attempts.
title: Fraud Detection & Reporting

section: What to Do If You Suspect Fraud
text:
If you notice unauthorized transactions or believe your account security has been compromised:
1. **Lock Your Card**: Immediately use the 'Lock Card' feature in the ZX Mobile App.
2. **Report the Activity**: Call our dedicated Fraud Hotline at 1-888-ZX-FRAUD (available 24/7).
3. **Change Your Password**: Update your online banking password and 2FA settings immediately.
title: Fraud Detection & Reporting

text: ZX Bank offers $0 Liability for unauthorized transactions reported within 60 days of the statement date. We will investigate and credit your account for valid fraud claims.
title: Fraud Detection & Reporting

text:
- Never share your PIN or 2FA codes with anyone, including bank employees.
- Monitor your account activity regularly via the mobile app.
- Enable real-time transaction alerts.
title: Fraud Detection & Reporting

text: If you see a charge on your statement that you don't recognize or disagree with (e.g., incorrect amount, duplicate charge, or services not rendered), you have the right to dispute it.
title: Dispute Resolution Process

text:
1. **Gather Documentation**: Collect receipts, invoices, or any correspondence with the merchant.
2. **Contact the Merchant First**: Most issues can be resolved faster by dealing directly with the merchant.
3. **Submit a Dispute to ZX Bank**: If the merchant cannot resolve the issue, you can file a formal dispute via:
   - **Mobile App**: Select the transaction and tap 'Dispute Transaction'.
   - **Online Banking**: Go to 'Account Services' and select 'Dispute Center'.
   - **Phone**: Call our Dispute Resolution team at 1-800-ZX-DISPUTE.
title: Dispute Resolution Process

text:
- **Initial Review**: We will acknowledge your dispute within 2 business days.
- **Investigation**: We typically resolve disputes within 10 to 45 days.
- **Provisional Credit**: In many cases, we will provide a provisional credit to your account while the investigation is ongoing.
title: Dispute Resolution Process

text:
- **Resolved in Your Favor**: The credit becomes permanent.
- **Resolved in Favor of the Merchant**: The provisional credit is reversed, and the original charge remains.
title: Dispute Resolution Process

text: Your account security is a shared responsibility. ZX Bank provides robust tools to help you protect your financial data.
title: Account Security & 2FA

text:
2FA adds an extra layer of security by requiring two forms of identification to access your account.
### How to Enable 2FA
1. Log in to the ZX Bank Mobile App.
2. Go to 'Settings' > 'Security Center'.
3. Select 'Two-Factor Authentication'.
4. Choose your preferred method:
   - **SMS Code**: A one-time code sent to your registered mobile number.
   - **Authenticator App**: Use apps like Google Authenticator or Authy for time-based codes.
   - **ZX Secure Token**: A push notification sent to your trusted mobile device.
title: Account Security & 2FA

text:
- Use a mix of uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols.
- Avoid using easily guessable information like birthdays or common words.
- Use a unique password for each of your online accounts.
title: Account Security & 2FA

text:
Sign up for security alerts to be notified about:
- Password changes
- Logins from new devices
- Large withdrawals or transfers
- Changes to your contact information
title: Account Security & 2FA

text: ZX Bank offers multiple ways to get in touch with our customer support team. Choose the method that is most convenient for you.
title: Customer Support Channels

text:
### 24/7 Phone Support
Call us anytime at 1-800-ZX-BANK-0 for general inquiries, account assistance, or technical support.

### Secure Messaging
Log in to the ZX Bank Mobile App or Online Banking and use our Secure Message Center to send a message to a representative. We typically respond within 1-2 hours.

### Live Chat
Available on our website and in the app from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM EST, Monday through Sunday. Look for the chat icon in the bottom right corner.

### Branch Network
Visit any ZX Bank branch during operating hours for in-person assistance.

### Social Media
Follow us on Twitter and Facebook @ZXBankSupport for quick updates and general questions. For security reasons, never share account details over social media.
title: Customer Support Channels

text: If your issue is not resolved to your satisfaction, you can request to speak with a supervisor or file a formal complaint through our Quality Assurance department.
title: Customer Support Channels

text: At ZX Bank, we are committed to protecting the personal and financial information of our customers. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your data.
title: ZX Bank Privacy Policy

text:
- **Personal Information**: Name, address, SSN, date of birth.
- **Financial Information**: Transaction history, account balances, credit scores.
- **Usage Data**: Information about how you interact with our website and mobile app.
title: ZX Bank Privacy Policy

text:
- To provide and manage your banking services.
- To process transactions and send related communications.
- To comply with legal and regulatory requirements.
- To prevent fraud and enhance security.
- To personalize your experience and improve our offerings.
title: ZX Bank Privacy Policy

text:
We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share information with:
- Service providers who help us operate our business.
- Regulatory authorities as required by law.
- Credit bureaus for credit reporting purposes.
title: ZX Bank Privacy Policy

text:
You have certain rights regarding your data, including:
- Opting out of marketing communications.
- Reviewing and updating your personal information.
- Accessing your data and requesting corrections.
title: ZX Bank Privacy Policy

text: We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.
title: ZX Bank Privacy Policy
